creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Erwin,

Could you please confirm you have the latest ports directory? Your
dns/dnsmasq should look like this:

root@starfish:/usr/ports/dns/dnsmasq# find * | xargs md5

MD5 (Makefile) = e894a70cdce3befe49dfcae2734538bb
MD5 (distinfo) = acb2c05bbcb1773b61e2398f6555b28a
MD5 (files) = b46ed59238aa774a65b322686f3119d6
MD5 (files/dnsmasq.sh.in) = 923bd0ef60c05d8054f47ac695fb75df
MD5 (pkg-descr) = b2abe48b187b35cdf091c5e67b900198
MD5 (pkg-plist) = fe20c9cf309c5b670094d3ba2a550608

I just throw it in tinderbox and it seems to build/install fine on 4,5,6 and
7. Could you please cvsup your ports tree and test it again?

-- Babak Farrokhi
